Description:
Ballistics of the 125mm Step-1 Tungsten APFSDS round for use on weapons of the D-81 family, including the ZPT-98-125. Designed in China and exported after 1992, did not enter widespread service with PLA. The same design is manufactured and exported by the Pakistan State Arsenal.

Projectile: 125-1 7.37 kg
- Charge: 8.65-8.73 kg TG-115
Note: due to developmental nature of the round, the listed charge design is believed to be representative yet may not reflect the final design.
	- Main:		4.07 kg 16/19 Rosette + 1.74 kg 21/1-35 + 2 x 0.05 kg BP
	- Incremental:		2.04 kg 17/19 Rosette + 0.88 kg 21/1-35
- Combustible Cartridge: 
	- 1.02-1.12 kg TNT impregnated nitrocellulose
		- 754 kJ/kg (as computed),
		- 686.5 kJ/kg (as measured)
		- Alternatively given as 588 kJ/kg
- Total: 9.4 kg (per specification)

Specification:      
 - Pm: <=471 MPa (15 °C) <= 536 MPa (50 °C) [Copper crusher gauge] M.V.: 1725 m/s
Measured:
 - Pm: 524 MPa [Piezoelectric] M.V. 1731 m/s (20 °C) 

Reference: 
-唐林《125mm I型穿甲弹的研制》，国营第803厂
-崔晋，王艳丽《125mm穿甲弹总体参数优化设计》，国营第803厂
-郑泽义，田书春《125mm坦克炮穿甲弹装药结构设计特点及分析》，国营845厂
-刘千里，王升晨，魏建国《管、粒混合装药的两相流内弹道模型在一二三工程上的应用》，兵器工业202所
-杨敏涛，李启明，李兵《装药结构对穿甲弹挤进过程中的阻力及药床挤压应力影响的试验研究》，兵器工业202所
-刘心和《楔式半自动闭气炮闩在125mm坦克炮上应用的论证》，兵器工业202所
-滑俊生，郑泽义《高膛压下装药结构的研究和发展》，国营845厂
